name: Braised Lamb Shanks a La Emeril Aka Osso Bucco Emeril
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds lamb shanks, cut into 1 1/2 inch sections
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Season the lamb shanks on both sides with salt and pepper.
3. Heat 1/2 cup oil in a large Dutch oven.
4. Dredge the shanks in flour, shaking off any excess.
5. Sear the shanks on both sides until golden brown.
6. Add onions, fennel, and garlic; cook for 4 minutes, stirring to ensure even cooking.
7. Add wine, tomatoes, and stock.
8. Bring mixture to a boil, cover, and place in oven.
9. Cook for 1 1/2 hours or until meat is tender enough to fall from the bone.
10. Adjust seasonings as needed.
11. Remove from Dutch oven and place on platter.
12. Top with chopped oregano, olives, and crumbled Feta.
Yield: 4 servings
